title: nelsonia brunelloides var. normalis
intro: Nelsonia brunelloides var. normalis, also known as Small Indian Mallow or Chhoti Malati, is a plant species that belongs to the family Acanthaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects, which are attributed to its active compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Nelsonia brunelloides var. normalis include its ability to treat respiratory issues like bronchitis, asthma, and allergies, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
